hero.title:
From Story
to Business.
hero.subtitle: We turn fandom IP into global businesses — planning, production, worldwide distribution, and monetization under one partner.

items.title: Genre versatility
items.desc: Romance, fantasy, action, BL, slice-of-life — we propose the right format for every IP.

items.title: One-stop production
items.desc: Planning, story, art, coloring, editing, localization, and distribution — all under one roof.

items.title: Per-process contracts
items.desc: Don't need full production? You can contract a single process — script, color, or translation alone.

services.title: From Story to Global Business
services.subtitle: Planning, production, global distribution, monetization — we design the full content-to-business pipeline under one roof.

items.title: Planning / Development
items.desc: We decode fandom, IP, and artist universes — then design story lines built for global serialization.

items.title: Production
items.desc: Script, storyboard, art, color, editing — end-to-end webtoon production in one studio system.

items.title: Distribution / Partnership
items.desc: Native localization across 14 languages and simultaneous rollout on 8 global platforms.

items.title: Monetization
items.desc: IP licensing, spin-offs, MD, fandom commerce — we extend every story into a revenue model.

works.title:
Creating Impact
Worldwide.
works.subtitle: Proven performance on global platforms — turning single stories into worldwide businesses.

cta.title:
From Story to Business.
Let's design it together.
cta.subtitle: Let's architect your global content business with WEAVUS.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Anchored on webtoon production and global localization, delivered end-to-end.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.subtitle: WEAVUS CONTENT is the content maker closest to K-culture fandoms.
aboutPage.mission: Turn fandom voices into stories, and stories into every language.
aboutPage.vision: The global No.1 fandom content studio — expanding artist universes into webtoon and story IP worldwide.

heroLead: Dreams are better when they sound a little crazy.
We move beyond common sense — turning imagination into reality.
WEAVUS is built on one mission: create the defining content of this century,
and stand with creators at full commitment.
Let's give form to the world you want to draw — together with WEAVUS.
creators.processSubtitle: Document review → Portfolio review → Matching → Contract → Serialization. We reply within 3 weeks.

process.title: Submit application
process.desc: Share your portfolio URL and basic info.

process.title: Document · portfolio review
process.desc: Our team responds within 3 weeks with a decision.

process.title: Matching
process.desc: Selected creators register as 'WEAVUS Creators' and get matched to projects.

process.title: Launch / Monetization
process.desc: From global platform serialization to IP expansion.

looking.title: Character illustration
looking.desc: Character art with a sense of panel flow for webtoon & manga.

looking.title: Line / sketch
looking.desc: Rough and line art showing proportion, pose, and expression.

looking.title: Background art
looking.desc: Landscapes, architecture, interiors — specialty background work.

looking.title: Color / finishing
looking.desc: Color, effects, and finish polish applied over other artists' line art.

notices: Your portfolio continues to be a reference even after the initial review.
Accepted applicants register as 'WEAVUS Creators' and are contacted when a project matches.
All work is offered as freelance (業務委託) contracts.
Minors must submit a guardian consent form.
